description: Jittered strip plot of 2025 SPG scores for the 183 Western-region schools, one dot per school in four locale rows (City, Suburb, Town, Rural), keeping clusters, gaps, outliers, and each group's true size visible.

title.text: SPG scores of Western-region schools by locale, 2025
title.subtitle: A jittered strip plot draws every school as its own dot (n = 183) — clusters, gaps, and outliers stay visible, and sparse groups show their true size.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI public accountability data (School Performance Grades), 2025. Style-guide demo.
